seed.symptoms: Asymmetric yellowing of leaves (huanglongbing means 'yellow dragon disease'); small, lopsided, bitter fruit; twig dieback; tree decline.
seed.causes: Bacterial pathogen Candidatus Liberibacter asiaticus; transmitted by Asian citrus psyllid (Diaphorina citri); no cure once infected.
seed.treatment: No cure; remove and destroy infected trees; control psyllid vector with insecticides.
seed.prevention: Use certified disease-free planting material; apply systemic insecticides to control psyllid; install wind barriers; quarantine measures.
